name: Biofrontera Inc.
business: We are a United States based biopharmaceutical company engaging in the development, manufacturing, and commercialization of pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions with a focus on photodynamic therapy (PDT). The Company's products, which include Ameluz as well as the BF-RhodoLED and RhodoLED XL lamp series, are used for the treatment of actinic keratosis (AK). We generate revenue by selling our products directly to dermatology offices and groups.

exposures.sentence: Our principal product is Ameluz, which is a prescription drug approved for use in combination with the RhodoLED Lamps, for PDT (when used together, Ameluz PDT).
The Company's products, which include Ameluz as well as the BF-RhodoLED and RhodoLED XL lamp series (together, the RhodoLED Lamps), are used for the treatment of actinic keratosis (AK).

catalysts.event: sBCC sNDA submission and PDUFA date
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025 a Supplemental New Drug Application was submitted to the FDA, applying for the approval of the treatment of sBCC by PDT with Ameluz and the BF-RhodoLED or the RhodoLED XL lamp. The FDA has accepted the filing and set a Prescription Drug User Fee Act date of September 28, 2026.
CSR for treatment phase expected Q2 2026.

catalysts.event: AK trunk & extremities regulatory filing expected
catalysts.sentence: Reg. filing for sNDA is expected for Q3 2026 for field treatment of AKs on extremities and neck and trunk.
Clinical Study Report (CSR) for treatment phase expected Q3 2026.
Ameluz Actinic Keratosis AK Pain Reduction; Plan to start enrollment in 2027

catalysts.event: Xepi asset sale with potential milestones
catalysts.sentence: On November 6, 2025, the Company entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement with an unaffiliated party, providing for the sale of the intangible asset relating to the Company's product, Xepi, for initial proceeds of $3 million with the potential for up to an additional $7 million in milestone payments.

tamClaims.claim: Total AK market size estimated at $4 billion
tamClaims.sentence: The total market size is estimated to be roughly $4 billion for the three therapy types.

tamClaims.claim: Target market for Ameluz PDT (converting cryotherapy of >14 lesions) is $500 million
tamClaims.sentence: This targeted market is about 11% or $500 million of the total AK market.
